deposit(uint256).details: Vault transfers tokens to this contract BEFORE calling this function

params.assets: Amount of underlying asset to deploy

harvest().details: For auto-compounding protocols (Aave), this is a no-op

totalAssets().details: For interest-bearing tokens (aUSDC, stETH), this grows automatically over time

params.assets: Amount of underlying asset to withdraw
params.recipient: Address to receive the withdrawn assets

deposit(uint256).notice: Receive `assets` from vault and deploy into the protocol

isActive().notice: Whether the adapter is currently active (not paused)

requiredLockPeriod().notice: Minimum lock period in seconds (0 = instant withdrawal)

totalAssets().notice: Total assets under management by this adapter

withdraw(uint256,address).notice: Withdraw `assets` from the protocol and send to `recipient`
